name: Bursting Tomatoes
subtitle: Umami-bombs that pop in your mouth
blrNote: Use the small "Local" cherry tomatoes. They have thicker skins which hold the carbonation inside better.
tldr: Whole cherry tomatoes in brine. They carbonate themselves. Like a healthy, savory soda in fruit form.

steps.title: Prick
steps.instruction: Prick each tomato once with a toothpick (so they don't explode during ferment).

steps.title: Brine
steps.instruction: Pack into a jar with garlic and cover with brine.

steps.title: Check
steps.instruction: Wait 3 days. When they look slightly "puffy," they are ready.

images.caption: Bursting Tomatoes
images.alt: Bursting Tomatoes — Umami-bombs that pop in your mouth

culturalContext.story: A favorite of modern "molecular" chefs. It’s an easy way to introduce carbonation into a salad.
culturalContext.funFact: If you leave them long enough, they turn into a fizzy tomato sauce base.
